name: IDMAM — Download Manager AI Max
description: Free, open-source download manager with multi-threaded acceleration. Intercepts downloads and sends them to IDMAM for maximum speed.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src http://127.0.0.1:9977 ws://127.0.0.1:9977; img-src 'self' data:
